data.body:
Obviously lawyers bring cases, but you can't retry a case that's already been ruled on. SCOTUS won't even hear the case, and there's no other court to go to.

The issue is who has the Constitution authority to overturn Supreme Court decisions.

SCOTUS and Congress have that power.

Lawyers do not.
